decks.notes: The key concept of this deck is to use the synergy between Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers and various support cards to create a fast and aggressive playstyle. The deck includes powerful creatures like Blightsteel Colossus and Emrakul, the Promised End, along with cards to ramp up mana quickly such as Basalt Monolith and Gilded Lotus. Spells like Lightning Bolt and Pyroblast provide direct damage to opponents, while cards like Explore and Farseek help to accelerate the deck's strategy. The goal is to overwhelm the opponent with a mix of powerful creatures and efficient spells, taking advantage of the aggressive nature of the Raph & Mikey, Troublemakers commander.

This deck focuses on aggressive gameplay with Spider-Man 2099 as the commander, utilizing a mix of powerful creatures and spells to control the board and deal damage quickly. The deck includes a variety of disruptive cards like Counterspell, Force Spike, and Spell Snare to disrupt the opponent's plans while also incorporating efficient removal like Lightning Bolt and Chain Lightning to deal with threats. Additionally, cards like True-Name Nemesis and Bonecrusher Giant provide strong bodies to pressure the opponent. The deck aims to establish an early advantage and maintain pressure throughout the game, utilizing a mix of evasion, removal, and countermagic to secure victories in one-on-one matchups.

The main concept of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with a fast and aggressive strategy, utilizing the powerful abilities of Cloud, Midgar Mercenary and a variety of other aggro creatures and support cards. The deck aims to control the board and disrupt the opponent's game plan with cards like Sanctifier en-Vec, Containment Priest, and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben. Additionally, the deck contains a suite of efficient removal spells such as Swords to Plowshares and Oust to deal with opposing threats. The inclusion of equipment cards like Sword of Feast and Famine and Umezawa's Jitte provides additional power and flexibility in combat. Overall, the deck is focused on applying pressure early and maintaining control of the battlefield to secure a victory.

The main focus of this deck is to create an overwhelming board presence with a variety of token generators and sacrifice outlets. By utilizing cards like Prossh, Skyraider of Kher, Purphoros, God of the Forge, and Goblin Bombardment, the deck aims to create an engine where sacrificing creatures generates value through damage and gaining life. The deck also includes various combo pieces like Blood Artist and Zulaport Cutthroat to drain opponents' life totals. With a mix of ramp, removal, and recursion, the deck is able to efficiently control the board and set up powerful win conditions through sacrificing creatures and triggering various abilities to overwhelm the opponent.

The main strategy of this deck is to overwhelm the opponent with aggressive creatures and utilize various sacrifice effects to generate value and deal damage. The deck focuses on creating a board presence with creatures like Slimefoot and Squee, while also including cards like Goblin Bombardment and Recurring Nightmare to sacrifice creatures for additional benefits. The deck also includes a toolbox of creatures and spells to adapt to different situations, with cards like Demonic Tutor and Survival of the Fittest enabling the player to search for specific answers or threats. Overall, the deck aims to apply constant pressure on the opponent while using sacrifice effects to maintain card advantage and control the battlefield.

The deck focuses on utilizing a wide range of disruptive spells and creatures to control the game early on before transitioning into a more aggressive playstyle in the mid to late game. Kefka, Court Mage serves as the commander, providing additional card advantage and flexibility in spellcasting. The deck includes a mix of removal spells, counterspells, and creatures that can disrupt the opponent's game plan while also presenting a threat. With a mana base that supports a variety of colors, the deck can consistently cast its spells and adapt to different matchups. Overall, the key concept of the deck is to disrupt the opponent's strategy while maintaining aggression to close out the game efficiently.

This aggressive deck focuses on utilizing the partner commanders, Yoshimaru and Kraum, along with a variety of powerful creatures and spells to quickly overwhelm the opponent. The deck includes a mix of efficient removal spells like Lightning Bolt and Path to Exile, as well as equipment like Embercleave and Lost Jitte to enhance the creatures' abilities. The deck also includes a range of powerful creatures with strong abilities like Mother of Runes and Thalia, Guardian of Thraben. Additionally, the deck features a diverse mana base with a combination of dual lands and fetch lands to ensure consistent access to the necessary colors of mana for its spells and creatures.
